task_completion.description: Open the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake event in the SeisComP GUI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a SeisComP application (like scolv - SeisComP Origin Locator View) open and displaying data or waveforms for the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake.

task_completion.description: Calculate or view the mb (Body Wave) magnitude in SeisComP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the magnitude calculation tab, window, or summary in the SeisComP GUI specifically displaying the 'mb' magnitude type and its computed value.

task_completion.description: Calculate or view the MLv (Local) magnitude in SeisComP.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the magnitude calculation tab, window, or summary in the SeisComP GUI specifically displaying the 'MLv' magnitude type and its computed value.

task_completion.description: Open or create the summary report file at /home/ga/magnitude_report.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, vim) or terminal command creating/editing a file named 'magnitude_report.txt' in the '/home/ga/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write the EventID in the correct format in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal output should clearly show the line 'EventID: [PublicID]' where [PublicID] is the specific ID for the Noto Peninsula event.

task_completion.description: Write the mb and MLv magnitudes in the correct format in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text editor or terminal output should clearly show the lines 'mb: [Value]' and 'MLv: [Value]' with the numerical values obtained from SeisComP.

integrity.description: Agent used the SeisComP GUI to find the magnitudes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for actual interaction with SeisComP windows (like scolv) rather than just running a pre-made script or querying the database directly via terminal to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The values written in the report match the values seen in the SeisComP GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numerical values for mb and MLv typed into the text editor should exactly match the values displayed in the SeisComP magnitude calculation windows.

integrity.description: Agent did not copy-paste pre-filled answers without calculation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent actually navigates through the SeisComP interface to compute/view the magnitudes before writing them to the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected report path is exactly '/home/ga/magnitude_report.txt'. The target magnitudes to be calculated and reported are 'mb' and 'MLv'. The reported values must match the database-computed values within a tolerance of 0.1.
